languages.text: "Дисфункция вызвана ложной инфо-разметкой. Всеведающий {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g}, даруй же нам точку отсчета". {n}Бормочет техножрец, замерший у когитатора. Часть лица закрывает толстая металлическая пластина, странного вида манипуляторы рисуют в воздухе невидимые круги. Из вокс-динамика, заменившего рот, звучит сухой и тихий голос:{/n} "Ваш вектор вычислен. Пожалуйста, предложите идентификационное обозначение".

traits.locale_text: "Дисфункция вызвана ложной инфо-разметкой. Всеведающий {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g}, даруй же нам точку отсчета". {n}Бормочет техножрец, замерший у когитатора. Часть лица закрывает толстая металлическая пластина, странного вида манипуляторы рисуют в воздухе невидимые круги. Из вокс-динамика, заменившего рот, звучит сухой и тихий голос:{/n} "Ваш вектор вычислен. Пожалуйста, предложите идентификационное обозначение".

languages.text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."
languages.original_text: "Дисфункция вызвана ложной инфо-разметкой. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. He has a thick metal plate instead of eyes, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

"The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

languages.text: “故障源于数据索引错误。全知的{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}，请赐予我们一个基准点吧，”{n}站在沉思者旁的技术神甫低语道。一块厚重的金属板覆盖了他半张脸，造型奇特的操纵机械触须在他周围画着看不见的圆。取代嘴巴的音阵扬声器里传出干涩而低沉的声音：{/n}“你的向量已计算完毕。请报上你的姓名识别码。”
languages.original_text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

traits.locale_text: “故障源于数据索引错误。全知的{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}，请赐予我们一个基准点吧，”{n}站在沉思者旁的技术神甫低语道。一块厚重的金属板覆盖了他半张脸，造型奇特的操纵机械触须在他周围画着看不见的圆。取代嘴巴的音阵扬声器里传出干涩而低沉的声音：{/n}“你的向量已计算完毕。请报上你的姓名识别码。”

languages.text: « La cause de la défaillance est une indexation erronée des données. Ô {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}, vous qui savez tout, donnez-nous un point de référence, » {n}murmure le technoprêtre qui se tient devant le cogitateur. Une épaisse plaque de métal recouvre une partie de son visage et ses étranges manipulateurs dessinent des cercles invisibles dans l'air autour de lui. Une voix sèche et calme émane du synthétiseur-vox qui lui tient lieu de bouche :{/n} « Votre vecteur a été calculé. Veuillez décliner votre appellation. »
languages.original_text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

traits.locale_text: « La cause de la défaillance est une indexation erronée des données. Ô {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}, vous qui savez tout, donnez-nous un point de référence, » {n}murmure le technoprêtre qui se tient devant le cogitateur. Une épaisse plaque de métal recouvre une partie de son visage et ses étranges manipulateurs dessinent des cercles invisibles dans l'air autour de lui. Une voix sèche et calme émane du synthétiseur-vox qui lui tient lieu de bouche :{/n} « Votre vecteur a été calculé. Veuillez décliner votre appellation. »

languages.text: "Arıza, hatalı veri dizinlemesinden kaynaklanıyor. Her şeyi bilen {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g} bize referans noktası bahşetsin." {n}Kavramsayarın başında duran Tekno Rahip mırıldanıyor. Yüzünün bir kısmını kalın bir metal plakası örtüyor. Tuhaf görünümlü çevirteçleri, Tekno Rahip'in etrafında havada görünmez daireler çiziyor. Ağzının yerini alan voks hoparlöründen kuru ve kısık bir ses çıkıyor.{/n} "Vektörünüz hesaplandı. Kendinizi tanımlayın."
languages.original_text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

traits.locale_text: "Arıza, hatalı veri dizinlemesinden kaynaklanıyor. Her şeyi bilen {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g} bize referans noktası bahşetsin." {n}Kavramsayarın başında duran Tekno Rahip mırıldanıyor. Yüzünün bir kısmını kalın bir metal plakası örtüyor. Tuhaf görünümlü çevirteçleri, Tekno Rahip'in etrafında havada görünmez daireler çiziyor. Ağzının yerini alan voks hoparlöründen kuru ve kısık bir ses çıkıyor.{/n} "Vektörünüz hesaplandı. Kendinizi tanımlayın."

languages.text: «El error proviene de un indexado de datos erróneo. Omnisciente {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, otórganos un punto de referencia». {n}El tecnosacerdote murmura frente al cogitador. Una gruesa plancha de metal cubre parte de su rostro, y sus extraños manipuladores dibujan círculos invisibles en el aire a su alrededor. Una voz seca y queda proviene del voco amplificador que ha reemplazado a su boca:{/n} «Su vector está calculado. Presente su designación».
languages.original_text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

traits.locale_text: «El error proviene de un indexado de datos erróneo. Omnisciente {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, otórganos un punto de referencia». {n}El tecnosacerdote murmura frente al cogitador. Una gruesa plancha de metal cubre parte de su rostro, y sus extraños manipuladores dibujan círculos invisibles en el aire a su alrededor. Una voz seca y queda proviene del voco amplificador que ha reemplazado a su boca:{/n} «Su vector está calculado. Presente su designación».

languages.text: "Die Fehlfunktion wird von einer fehlerhaften Datenindexierung verursacht. Allwissender {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, gewähre uns einen Referenzpunkt", {n}murmelt der vor dem Cogitator stehende Techpriester. Eine dicke Metallplatte bedeckt einen Teil seines Gesichts und seine seltsam anmutenden Manipulatoren zeichnen unsichtbare Kreise in die Luft. Aus dem Vox-Lautsprecher, der seinen Mund ersetzt, ertönt eine trockene und leise Stimme:{/n} "Euer Vektor wurde berechnet. Erbitte Identifizierung."
languages.original_text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."

traits.locale_text: "Die Fehlfunktion wird von einer fehlerhaften Datenindexierung verursacht. Allwissender {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, gewähre uns einen Referenzpunkt", {n}murmelt der vor dem Cogitator stehende Techpriester. Eine dicke Metallplatte bedeckt einen Teil seines Gesichts und seine seltsam anmutenden Manipulatoren zeichnen unsichtbare Kreise in die Luft. languages.text: 「データのインデックスが誤っている。全知の{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニシア{/g}様、ご教示ください」{n}、コギターの前に立つテクプリストが呟く。彼の顔の一部を覆う厚い金属板と、奇妙な形状の操作器が、彼の周囲で空中に円を描く。彼の口の代わりに設置されたボイススピーカーから、乾いた静かな声が響く。{/n}「あなたのベクトルが計算されました。あなたの識別番号を提示してください」
languages.original_text: "The malfunction is caused by erroneous data-indexing. All-knowing {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, grant us a point of reference," {n}murmurs the Tech-Priest standing at the cogitator. A thick metal plate covers part of his face, and his strange-looking manipulators draw invisible circles in the air around him. A dry and quiet voice comes from the vox-speaker that has replaced his mouth:{/n} "Your vector has been calculated. Please present your designation."
